title: foldgate: a training-free, shift-robust conformal reliability layer for protein-ligand co-folding
description: foldgate converts protein-ligand co-folding confidence (AlphaFold3, Boltz, Chai, Protenix) into risk-controlled accept/abstain decisions with finite-sample conformal guarantees. It demonstrates that standard conformal coverage collapses under novel-pocket / novel-chemotype distribution shift and repairs it with group-conditional and weighted conformal keyed on training-set similarity. Training-free and model-agnostic: it consumes frozen models' confidence outputs and never retrains a co-folding model.
